label: TOOLS
expected_behavior: Collapses/expands the TOOLS sidebar group via toggleNavSection('tools'); flips #toggle-tools chevron and #section-tools .open class.
notes: Section header; child nav items below depend on it being expanded.

label: 🚪 Door-to-Door
expected_behavior: goTo('d2d') — routes to SPA view-d2d (in-dashboard), hydrates tpl-view-d2d and the d2d-tracker module renders the map + tabs.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html (not a separate page).

label: 🗺️ Maps & Pins
expected_behavior: goToD2DFromMaps() → goTo('d2d') plus a one-time toast 'Maps features are now part of D2D Tracker'. Maps & Pins is now an alias that redirects into the D2D view; it does NOT open view-map.
notes: The standalone tpl-view-map still exists (reachable via mobile More 'map' / other paths) but the sidebar item redirects to D2D.

label: 📁 Templates
expected_behavior: goTo('docs') — routes to SPA view-docs (Template Library); hydrates tpl-view-docs and NBDDocs.render() populates panels.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html.

label: 📦 Products
expected_behavior: goTo('products') — routes to SPA view-products (Product Library); product-library.js renders into #productLibraryContainer.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html.

label: ✏️ Drawing
expected_behavior: goTo('draw') — routes to SPA view-draw (Drawing Tool); hydrates tpl-view-draw, maps.js wires the Leaflet draw instance.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html.

label: 🎯 Sales Training
expected_behavior: goTo('training') — routes to SPA view-training; sales-training-ui.js renders the menu (scenarios + Objection Obliterator) into #trainingContent.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html.

label: 🎓 Real Deal Academy
expected_behavior: goTo('academy') — routes to SPA view-academy; real-deal-academy.js renders the course catalog into #academyContainer.
notes: SPA view inside dashboard.html.

label: Address Search input
expected_behavior: Free-text address; Enter fires searchMap (data-enter-action) and hides the autocomplete dropdown; geocodes + recenters the map.
notes: view-map template; reached via mobile More 'map' or crm tools, not the sidebar Maps&Pins item.

label: Go (address search)
expected_behavior: call→searchMap(): geocodes the #mapSearch value and pans/zooms the Leaflet map to the result, showing the property card.

label: Door Knock Heat Map toggle
expected_behavior: mapOverlay→toggleOverlay('heat', el): toggles the door-knock density heat layer and the .on state on the toggle.
notes: One of 5 Map Layer toggles (heat/pins/jobs/storm/weather), same handler keyed by data-target.

label: All Pins toggle
expected_behavior: mapOverlay→toggleOverlay('pins', el): shows/hides all color-coded dispositioned door pins (default ON).

label: Jobs Overlay toggle
expected_behavior: mapOverlay→toggleOverlay('jobs', el): shows/hides In Progress / Complete / Finalizing job leads on the map.

label: Storm Activity toggle
expected_behavior: mapOverlay→toggleOverlay('storm', el): shows/hides NOAA hail & wind data layer.

label: Live Weather toggle
expected_behavior: mapOverlay→toggleOverlay('weather', el): shows/hides the current precipitation radar layer.

label: Zone name input
expected_behavior: Free-text territory zone name (e.g. 'North Territory'); read by saveZone() when saving a drawn zone.
notes: Inside Territory Zones panel.

label: Zone color swatch (6: blue/green/orange/purple/gold/red)
expected_behavior: zoneColor→selectZoneColor(cssVar, el): sets the active zone color used when drawing the next territory; moves the active-ring border to the chosen swatch.
notes: Repeats 6× (one per color); record one representative. Red is default active (#zoneColorActive).

label: 💾 Save Zone
expected_behavior: call→saveZone(): persists the currently drawn territory polygon with the entered name/color to the zone list.

label: ✕ (cancel zone draw)
expected_behavior: call→cancelZoneDraw(): aborts the in-progress territory draw and hides the zone panel.

label: 🗺 Draw New Zone
expected_behavior: call→startZoneDraw(): enters territory-polygon draw mode; reveals the zone name/color panel and Save/Cancel controls.
notes: Also has a FAB twin (#fab-zone) on the map bottom bar.

label: Drop-a-pin address input
expected_behavior: Address text (blank = map center); used by dropPinByAddress() to geocode and place a pin of the selected status.
notes: Has autocomplete dropdown #ac-pinAddrInput.

label: 📍 (drop pin by address)
expected_behavior: call→dropPinByAddress(): geocodes #pinAddrInput (or uses map center) and opens the pin-confirm dialog for the selected status.

label: Pin status buttons (8: Not Home/Interested/Not Interested/Signed/Callback/Do Not Knock/Left Material/Follow Up)
expected_behavior: selectPin(status, color, el): sets the active pin disposition (and map badge); subsequent map-click/address drop places a pin of this status.
notes: Repeats 8× (one per disposition). Not Home is default .active.

label: 📍 My Location (sidebar)
expected_behavior: call→damagNearMe(): requests geolocation and recenters the map on the rep's current position.

label: 🗑 Clear All Pins
expected_behavior: call→clearAllPins(): removes all dropped pins from the map (expected to confirm before wiping).
notes: Destructive — drive only to confirm boundary.

label: Spyglass address search input
expected_behavior: Address text; Enter fires spyglassSearch (data-enter-action) — geocodes and flies to an aerial spyglass view of any address.
notes: Floating Spyglass panel overlaid on the map.

label: 📍 (spyglass go to my location)
expected_behavior: call→spyglassGoToLocation(): geolocates and flies the spyglass view to the rep's location.
notes: Also duplicated as the first map FAB (line 8140).

label: Go (spyglass)
expected_behavior: call→spyglassSearch(): geocodes #spyglassInput and flies to the aerial spyglass view of that address.

label: Map FAB toggles (Heat/Pins/Jobs/Storm/Weather)
expected_behavior: call→fabToggle('<layer>', el): bottom-bar mirror of the sidebar Map Layer toggles; toggles the layer and the FAB active state.
notes: Repeats 5× (fab-heat/pins/jobs/storm/weather); duplicate of the Map Layer toggles. data-pass-el passes the element.

label: ⚡ Storm Here (FAB)
expected_behavior: call→quickStormCheck(): runs a storm/hail check at the rep's current location and surfaces the result.

label: ☰ Map Tools (sidebar toggle)
expected_behavior: mapSidebar→toggleMapSidebar('map-sidebar-map'): shows/hides the map tools sidebar (mobile reflow).

label: Cancel (pin confirm)
expected_behavior: call→cancelPinConfirm(): dismisses the Confirm Pin Placement dialog without saving.
notes: Dialog appears after dropPinByAddress / map-click.

label: Pin notes textarea
expected_behavior: Optional free-text notes saved with the pin when commitPin() runs.

label: 📍 Save Pin
expected_behavior: call→commitPin(): persists the pin at the confirmed coordinates with status + notes to the door-knock data.

label: Property Address input (draw)
expected_behavior: Address text; Enter fires searchDraw — geocodes and recenters the drawing map on the property.

label: Go (draw address)
expected_behavior: call→searchDraw(): geocodes #drawSearch and pans/zooms the drawing map to the property.

label: 📍 My Location (draw)
expected_behavior: call→goToMyLocation(): geolocates and recenters the drawing map on the rep's position.

label: Draw Mode buttons (Lines/Perimeter/Eave-Rake/Gutters)
expected_behavior: call→setDrawMode('<mode>', el): switches the active draw mode (line/perim/er/gutter); toggles status bars (perimBar/erBar) and the active button ring.
notes: Repeats 4× (line/perim/er/gutter). Lines is default .active. data-pass-el.

label: Exit Eave/Rake mode
expected_behavior: call→modeLineDraw(): returns to Lines mode via setDrawMode('line', #modeLineBtn).

label: Eave / Rake segment chooser
expected_behavior: call→perimChooseType('eave'|'rake'): tags the just-drawn perimeter segment as Eave (solid) or Rake (dashed).
notes: Two buttons (eave/rake).

label: Line Type buttons (11: Ridge/Ridge Vent/Hip/Valley/Rake/Eave/Flashing/Step Flash/Drip Edge/Parapet/Gutters)
expected_behavior: selLineType→selLT(idx, el): sets the active line type/color for the next drawn line; toggles the active state on the chosen lt-btn.
notes: Repeats 11× (data-target 0..10). Ridge (0) is default .active.

label: ▶ Draw
expected_behavior: toggle→toggleDraw(): enables/disables draw-on-map mode so clicks add measurement points.

label: ↩ Undo
expected_behavior: call→undoLine(): removes the last-drawn line/point.

label: ✕ (clear drawing)
expected_behavior: call→clearDraw(): clears all drawn lines/facets from the canvas (expected confirm before wiping work).
notes: Destructive — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Pitch select
expected_behavior: data-on-change=recalc: sets the roof pitch multiplier (Flat..12/12) and recomputes Base/Pitched/With-Waste/Squares in the calc panel.
notes: 10 options; 8/12 default selected.

label: Waste select
expected_behavior: data-on-change=recalc: sets the waste factor (10–30%) and recomputes the With-Waste / Squares totals.
notes: 6 options; 17% default selected.

label: 🧠 Smart Waste (AI)
expected_behavior: call→applySmartWaste(): computes a recommended waste % from roof complexity and applies it, populating #smartWasteInfo.

label: 📋 Generate Estimate
expected_behavior: call→importToEstimate(): pushes drawn measurements into the Estimate builder and navigates there.

label: 💾 Save to Customer
expected_behavior: call→saveDrawingToCustomer(): persists the current drawing/measurements to a chosen customer/lead record.

label: 📂 Load from Customer
expected_behavior: call→loadDrawingFromCustomer(): loads a previously saved drawing from a customer record onto the canvas.

label: 📤 Measurement Report
expected_behavior: call→exportDrawReport(): generates/exports a measurement report (PDF) of the drawn roof.

label: 📋 Scope of Work
expected_behavior: call→generateScopeFromDrawing(): builds a scope-of-work document from the drawn line types/measurements.

label: 🧱 Material Takeoff
expected_behavior: call→showMaterialTakeoff(): computes and displays a materials takeoff (squares, LF by line type, accessories) from the drawing.
notes: Material-takeoff tool called out in surface scope.

label: 📎 Xactimate Export (ESX)
expected_behavior: call→exportXactimateESX(): exports the drawing/measurements as an Xactimate ESX file.

label: ☀️ Solar Analysis
expected_behavior: call→runSolarAnalysis(): runs solar suitability/irradiance analysis on the drawn roof facets.
notes: Solar tool called out in surface scope.

label: ＋ Add Structure (Garage, Shed...)
expected_behavior: call→addStructure(): adds an additional structure to the drawing (multi-structure support) and lists it in #structureList.

label: 🗺️ Layer
expected_behavior: toggle→toggleMapLayer(): cycles the basemap between Satellite / Street / Hybrid.

label: 🔍 Fit All
expected_behavior: call→zoomToFit(): zooms/pans the map to fit all drawn lines in view.

label: 📸 Screenshot
expected_behavior: call→screenshotMap(): captures/exports a screenshot image of the current map + drawing.
notes: Screenshot tool called out in surface scope.

label: 📐 Angles
expected_behavior: call→showAngles(): overlays the interior angle at each drawn vertex.
notes: Angles tool called out in surface scope.

label: ☀️ Shadow Pitch
expected_behavior: call→startShadowPitch(): enters shadow-based pitch estimation from satellite imagery; results in #shadowBar.

label: 🤖 Auto-Detect
expected_behavior: call→startAutoDetect(): AI auto-detects roof edges; reveals #autoDetectBar with Accept/Cancel.

label: 🎤 Voice
expected_behavior: toggle→toggleVoiceControl(): starts/stops voice-controlled measurement; logs to #voiceLog.

label: 🕐 History
expected_behavior: toggle→toggleHistoricalImagery(): opens/closes the historical imagery panel (#historyPanel) for comparing past satellite imagery.

label: 🎬 Present
expected_behavior: call→startPresentation(): launches a full-screen homeowner presentation of the drawing/measurements.

label: ⚖️ Compare
expected_behavior: call→openComparisonMode(): opens #comparisonModal to upload an EagleView/RoofScope report for side-by-side comparison.

label: Historical imagery date slider
expected_behavior: data-on-input=setHistoricalLayer (pass int): switches the displayed historical imagery layer by date index (0–7); updates #historyDateLabel.

label: Historical imagery opacity slider
expected_behavior: data-on-input=updateHistoryOpacity: sets the historical layer opacity (0–1); updates #historyOpacityLabel.

label: ✕ (close historical imagery)
expected_behavior: closeModal→closeHistoricalImagery(): closes the historical imagery panel.

label: ✓ Accept Edges
expected_behavior: call→acceptAutoDetect(): commits the AI-detected roof edges as drawn lines.

label: ✕ Cancel (auto-detect)
expected_behavior: call→cancelAutoDetect(): discards the AI edge detection without adding lines.

label: ☰ Draw Tools (sidebar toggle)
expected_behavior: mapSidebar→toggleMapSidebar('map-sidebar-draw'): shows/hides the drawing tools sidebar (mobile reflow).

label: Drop report here / click to browse
expected_behavior: clickProxy→#compFile.click(): opens the file picker for the EagleView/RoofScope comparison report (PDF/txt/csv/xml).
notes: Hidden #compFile input fires handleComparisonFile on change (pass files0).

label: Comparison report file input
expected_behavior: data-on-change=handleComparisonFile (pass files0): parses the uploaded report and shows the measurement comparison in #comparisonResults.
notes: Accepts .pdf,.txt,.csv,.xml.

label: Cancel / ✕ (comparison modal)
expected_behavior: closeModal→closeComparisonMode(): dismisses the comparison modal.
notes: Two elements (top ✕ and bottom Cancel), same handler.

label: ＋ Upload (Templates header)
expected_behavior: call→openUploadDoc(): reveals the Add Document upload area (#docUploadArea) in the Template Library.

label: Template category filter (All/Generators/Insurance/Contracts/Leave-Behinds/Marketing)
expected_behavior: call→tlFilterCat('<cat>', el): filters visible template categories to the chosen group and sets the active filter button.
notes: Repeats 6× (all/generators/insurance/contracts/leave_behind/marketing). All is default active. data-pass-el.

label: Template category header (collapse/expand)
expected_behavior: call→tlToggleCat(el): collapses/expands the clicked template category's body; flips the chevron.
notes: Repeats 5× (one per category). data-pass-el.

label: Template doc rows (24: proposal, invoice, warranty_certificate, certificate_of_completion, supplement_request, scope_of_work, inspectionInsurance, assignment_of_benefits, change_order, contract, work_authorization, payment_agreement, material_delivery, thank_you, company_intro, financing_options, inspectionHomeowner, storm_checklist, claim_guide, referral_card, before_after_report, door_hanger, neighborhood_mailer, testimonial_sheet)
expected_behavior: docgen→NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('<template>'): lazy-loads the docgen bundle then opens the fill-and-generate flow for that branded document.
notes: Repeats 24× (one per data-target listed in label). Generators auto-fill from CRM; others are static templates. Record one representative; verify each target resolves in NBDDocGen.

label: Open Pipeline → (empty uploaded-docs state)
expected_behavior: goTo('crm'): routes to the CRM pipeline so the rep can pick a lead to attach a document to (upload is per-lead on customer.html).

label: Document Name input
expected_behavior: Free-text document title saved with the uploaded file when saveDocUpload() runs.

label: Document Category select
expected_behavior: Selects the category (Contract/Supplement/Scope of Work/Photo Report/Insurance Correspondence/Other) saved with the uploaded doc.

label: Click to select file (PDF, DOC, JPG)
expected_behavior: clickProxy→#docFileInput.click(): opens the file picker for the document to upload.

label: Document file input
expected_behavior: data-on-change=handleDocUpload (pass element): stages the selected file (.pdf/.doc/.docx/.jpg/.png) for upload.

label: Upload Document
expected_behavior: call→saveDocUpload(): uploads the staged file with name/category to storage.

label: ✕ Cancel (upload area)
expected_behavior: closeModal→closeUploadDoc(): hides the Add Document upload area.

label: + Add Product
expected_behavior: data-pl-action addProduct: opens the product add/edit modal (blank) to create a new product with name/category/Good-Better-Best tiers/unit.
notes: Dynamically rendered by product-library.js into the SPA view.

label: Export CSV
expected_behavior: data-pl-action exportCSV: exports the product library to a CSV download.

label: Reset
expected_behavior: data-pl-action resetDefaults: resets the product library to the default catalog (expected to confirm before overwriting custom products).
notes: Destructive (wipes customizations) — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Tier filter (All Tiers / Good / Better / Best)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action setTierFilter (data-pl-id=tier): filters the product list by pricing tier; highlights the active tier button.
notes: Repeats per tier; All Tiers default.

label: Category filter chips (All + per-category)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action setFilter (data-pl-id=category): filters the product list by category; highlights the active chip.
notes: Repeats per category (count rendered dynamically).

label: Product category header (collapse/expand)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action toggleCategory (data-pl-id=catId): collapses/expands a product category section.
notes: Repeats per category.

label: Edit (product row)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action editProduct (data-pl-id=productId): opens the product modal pre-filled for editing that product.
notes: Repeats per product row; record one representative.

label: Archive (product row)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action archiveProduct (data-pl-id=productId): archives (hides) the product from the active library.
notes: Repeats per product row. Soft-delete style — drive to confirm boundary.

label: Add Product / Update (modal save)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action saveFromModal: validates and saves the new/edited product (name/category/tier pricing/unit) from the modal.
notes: Modal also has Cancel (closeModal) and, when editing, a Delete (deleteFromModal).

label: Delete (product modal)
expected_behavior: data-pl-action deleteFromModal: permanently deletes the product being edited.
notes: Only present when editing an existing product. Destructive — drive to confirm boundary.

label: Objection Obliterator (rapid-fire banner)
expected_behavior: data-st-action startRapidFire: launches the Objection Obliterator rapid-fire objection drill.
notes: Dynamically rendered by sales-training-ui.js.

label: 📊 My Profile
expected_behavior: data-st-action showProfile: renders the training profile view (session stats, 6-skill scores).

label: Scenario simulator card
expected_behavior: data-st-action startScenario (data-st-id=scenarioId): starts the Pitch Perfector branching scenario simulator for that scenario.
notes: Repeats per scenario in the training grid; record one representative.

label: Scenario decision option
expected_behavior: data-st-action chooseOption (data-st-id=index): selects a branching dialogue choice; scores it and advances the scenario to feedback.
notes: Repeats per option; plus advance (line 191), backToMenu (132/164/248), and Try Again (247).

label: Rapid-fire answer option
expected_behavior: data-st-action rapidAnswer (data-st-id=index): submits an objection-drill answer; reveals correctness, then rapidNext advances.
notes: Repeats per option. rapid_results screen has Try Again (startRapidFire) + Back to Menu.

label: Academy course card
expected_behavior: Click opens the course's lesson list (renderCourse); locked tier cards (🔒) are non-clickable until the tier is unlocked.
notes: Repeats per course in the catalog grid; record one representative. Some tier-locked (plan/tier-gated).

label: Lesson (open lesson)
expected_behavior: data-action open-lesson (data-course-id/data-lesson-id): opens the lesson detail view (content + optional quiz).
notes: Repeats per lesson; record one representative.

label: ← Back (to courses / to course)
expected_behavior: data-action back-to-courses / back-to-course: navigates up one level (lesson→course list, or lesson detail→course).
notes: Two variants (back-to-courses, back-to-course).

label: Mark lesson complete
expected_behavior: data-action mark-lesson-complete (data-course-id/data-lesson-id): records lesson completion and updates the course progress bar.

label: Submit quiz
expected_behavior: data-action submit-quiz: grades the lesson quiz answers and shows the score/result.
notes: Quiz form present only on lessons that include a quiz.

label: Mark complete (insurance/retail decision-tree node)
expected_behavior: data-action mark-complete (data-node-id): marks the academy decision-tree node complete and advances; modal also has prev-node/next-node navigation.
reveal_state: modal:academy node (after opening a tree node)
notes: Node modal includes prev-node (1309) and next-node (1312) too (disabled at ends).

label: D2D tab (Knock board sub-tabs)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action setTab (data-d2d-id=tabId): switches the D2D tracker sub-view (map/list/route/etc.); underlines the active tab.
notes: Dynamically rendered by d2d-tracker-ui-2026b.js. Repeats per tab.

label: 🚪 Knock (new knock)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action openQuickKnock: opens the Quick Knock modal (address + disposition picker + photo/voice) to log a door knock.
notes: Core D2D flow. Also reachable via mobile create popover (knock) and the CRM ＋ New Knock button.

label: 🔥/❄️ Heat
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action toggleHeatMap: toggles the door-knock heat-map layer on the D2D map; swaps the 🔥/❄️ icon.

label: ⛈ Hail
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action toggleHail: toggles recent hail reports overlay on the D2D map.

label: 📍 Me
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action centerOnMe: geolocates and recenters the D2D map on the rep's position.

label: 📥 CSV
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action exportCSV: exports the knock log to a CSV download.

label: Disposition button (Quick Knock modal)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action selectDispo (data-d2d-id=key): selects the door disposition (interested/not-home/etc.) for the knock being logged; enables Save.
notes: Repeats per disposition. Modal also has capturePhoto (336) and startVoice (337).

label: Save knock (Quick Knock modal)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action submitKnock: persists the knock (address + disposition + photo/voice/notes); disabled until a disposition is chosen.
notes: Core write. Starts disabled.

label: ✅ Convert to Lead (knock card / detail)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action convertToLead (data-d2d-id=knockId): converts the knock into a CRM lead; convertToLeadWithEdit opens the lead modal pre-filled.
notes: Repeats per knock. Also convert-prompt variants at :514/:517 after saving a knock.

label: Knock card (open detail)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action openKnockDetail (data-d2d-id=knockId): opens the knock detail modal (photos, phone, re-knock, follow-up, delete).
notes: Repeats per knock; record one representative.

label: 📱 Follow Up (knock detail)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action openSMSChooser (data-d2d-id=knockId): opens the SMS follow-up chooser to text the door's phone.
reveal_state: modal:knockDetail (only when knock has a phone)
notes: Send path (SMS) — drive to confirm/compose boundary only.

label: 🗑️ Delete (knock detail)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action deleteKnock (data-d2d-id=knockId): deletes the knock record.
notes: Destructive — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: 🗺️ Calculate Walking Route
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action calcRoute: computes an optimized walking route across the knock pins; clearRoute removes it.

label: Date range pill (knock list filter)
expected_behavior: data-d2d-action setDateFilter (data-d2d-id=range): filters the knock list to a date range; setDispoFilter (dispo bar/legend) filters by disposition.
notes: Repeats per range. Disposition filter via bar segments/legend chips.

label: Mobile Tools items (Door-to-Door/Maps & Pins/Damage Photos/Templates/Products/Drawing Tool/Sales Training/Real Deal Academy)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('<view>') then closeMobileMore(): routes to the corresponding TOOLS view and dismisses the drawer.
notes: Mobile mirror of the sidebar TOOLS items. Note 'map' here targets the standalone view-map (not the goToD2DFromMaps redirect). All carry data-close-more.

label: ✏️ Drawing Tool (CRM Tools dropdown)
expected_behavior: toolMenuGoTo('draw'): closes the CRM Tools menu and routes to the Drawing view.
notes: Alternate entry point to the Drawing tool from the CRM toolbar dropdown.
